properties.text: Reentrancy guard must prevent reentrant calls to bid() via callback execution.
properties.assertion: forall call bid(asset,amt,data): s_entered==true during execution => nested bid() reverts

properties.text: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling payment; callback must not bypass payment pull.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): safeTransfer(bidder,amt) precedes safeTransferFrom(bidder,assetOutAmt)

properties.text: Bid amount must not exceed available auction balance for the asset.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): amount <= balanceOf(this,asset) => no revert on transfer

properties.text: Price decay multiplier must linearly decrease from start to end over auction duration.
properties.assertion: priceMultiplier == startMult - (startMult - endMult) * elapsed / duration

properties.text: All rounding in assetOutAmount computation must round UP in favor of the protocol.
properties.assertion: forall _getAssetOutAmount: actual_out >= floor_out (mulDivUp and mulWadUp used)

properties.text: No new auctions started if assetOut price is invalid (checkUpkeep clears eligible list).
properties.assertion: !isAssetOutPriceValid => eligibleAssetsIdx == 0 in checkUpkeep return

properties.text: Bid must revert if auction is not live (auctionStart==0 or duration elapsed).
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): auctionStart==0 OR elapsed>duration => revert InvalidAuction

properties.text: Elapsed time clamped to auctionDuration in getAssetOutAmount preventing underflow.
properties.assertion: elapsedTime = min(elapsedTime, auctionDuration) before multiplier computation

properties.text: Cannot start auction for asset already in live auction (performUpkeep reverts).
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): s_auctionStarts[asset]!=0 => revert LiveAuction

properties.text: AssetOut eligible balance forwarded to receiver instead of starting auction.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep: asset==s_assetOut => transfer to assetOutReceiver, no auctionStart set

properties.text: Auction end handler returns remaining asset to feeAggregator and assetOut to receiver.
properties.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd(asset): remaining(asset)->feeAggregator AND assetOut->receiver

properties.text: Cannot modify asset params while a live auction exists for that asset.
properties.assertion: forall applyAssetParamsUpdates: auctionStart[asset]!=0 => revert LiveAuction

properties.text: endingPriceMultiplier must be >= i_minPriceMultiplier (immutable lower bound).
properties.assertion: forall applyAssetParamsUpdates: endingPriceMultiplier >= i_minPriceMultiplier

properties.text: startingPriceMultiplier must be >= endingPriceMultiplier for valid price decay.
properties.assertion: forall assetParams: startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier

properties.text: AssetOut params skip duration/multiplier validation (only minAuctionSizeUsd required).
properties.assertion: forall applyAssetParamsUpdates: asset==s_assetOut => skip duration/multiplier checks

properties.text: Old assetOut params deleted when assetOut changes to prevent stale param usage.
properties.assertion: forall setAssetOut(new): s_assetParams[old] deleted after s_assetOut = new

properties.text: Bid USD value must meet minimum bid threshold to prevent dust bids.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount): amount*assetPrice/10^dec >= minBidUsdValue

properties.text: Callback must not allow bidder to avoid payment pull after receiving auctioned asset.
properties.assertion: forall bid with callback: safeTransferFrom(bidder,this,assetOutAmount) must succeed post-callback

properties.text: Only feeAggregator balance counted for eligible auction assets, not contract balance.
properties.assertion: checkUpkeep reads feeAggregator.balanceOf(asset) not address(this).balanceOf(asset)

properties.text: Auction ends when duration elapsed OR remaining balance below minAuctionSizeUsd.
properties.assertion: checkUpkeep: auctionEnded iff (elapsed>duration OR (priceValid AND bal<minSize))

properties.text: After bid settles, s_entered must be reset to false.
properties.assertion: forall bid(): after emit AuctionBidSettled => s_entered == false

properties.text: Auction start timestamp must equal block.timestamp at time of performUpkeep execution.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep start: s_auctionStarts[asset] == block.timestamp

properties.text: feeAggregator.transferForSwap must be called before any auction starts in performUpkeep.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep: transferForSwap(this, eligible) precedes s_auctionStarts[asset]=timestamp

properties.text: FeeAggregator interface check bypassed only when feeAggregator==address(this).
properties.assertion: forall setFeeAggregator(addr): addr!=this => must pass supportsInterface(IFeeAggregator)

properties.text: checkUpkeep/performUpkeep data consistency: decoded performData must match checkUpkeep output.
properties.assertion: performUpkeep(checkUpkeep().performData) must process same eligible/ended sets

properties.text: Stale performData between checkUpkeep and performUpkeep can start auctions with invalid state.
properties.assertion: performUpkeep re-validates auctionStart==0 and balance>=minSize for each eligible asset

properties.text: Decimal mismatch in asset params add must revert to prevent price miscalculation.
properties.assertion: forall applyAssetParamsUpdates add: params.decimals != ERC20(asset).decimals() => revert

properties.text: Callback gas consumption must not prevent payment pull from completing.
properties.assertion: forall bid with data.length>0: callback gas limited or safeTransferFrom succeeds after

properties.text: Bidder receives exact computed assetOutAmount, no extra tokens drained via rounding.
properties.assertion: forall bid: transferred_out == _getAssetOutAmount(params,price,amount,elapsed,true)

properties.text: Auction balance available for bidding must equal actual ERC20 balance of contract.
properties.assertion: availableBalance used in bid() == ERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))

properties.text: Direct ERC20 deposits during live auction inflate available balance for bid() callers only.
properties.assertion: arbitrary deposits increase balanceOf(this) used by bid() but not by CowSwap solver

properties.text: setAssetOut and setFeeAggregator must revert if any live auction exists.
properties.assertion: forall setAssetOut/setFeeAggregator: _whenNoLiveAuctions() => revert if any auctionStart!=0

properties.text: Auction eligible asset USD value must meet minAuctionSizeUsd threshold.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep eligible: availableAssetUsdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd

properties.text: Ended auction cleanup must delete s_auctionStarts entry and call _onAuctionEnd.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep ended: s_auctionStarts[asset] deleted AND _onAuctionEnd called

properties.text: Price multiplier at t=0 equals startingPriceMultiplier, at t=duration equals endingPriceMultiplier.
properties.assertion: getAssetOutAmount(elapsed=0).mult == startMult AND getAssetOutAmount(elapsed=dur).mult == endMult

properties.text: Malicious callback reverting must not leave s_entered locked (DoS on future bids).
properties.assertion: if callback reverts => entire bid() reverts => s_entered remains false (no state change)

properties.text: Auction price at any time t must be monotonically non-increasing as t increases.
properties.assertion: forall t1<t2: getAssetOutAmount(t2) <= getAssetOutAmount(t1) for same input amount

properties.text: performUpkeep must fetch assetOut price with validation=true before starting auctions.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep eligible: getAssetPrice(assetOut,true) called before auction starts

properties.text: Total assetOut paid by all bidders in an auction must not exceed contract assetOut balance.
properties.assertion: sum(assetOutAmount for all bids in auction) <= initial assetOut balance at auction start

properties.text: Flash-loan bid pattern: bidder must have assetOut balance to pay after callback returns.
properties.assertion: forall bid with callback: ERC20(assetOut).balanceOf(bidder) >= assetOutAmount post-callback

properties.text: Multiplier computation must not underflow when startMult equals endMult.
properties.assertion: startMult == endMult => priceMultiplier == startMult (no subtraction underflow)

properties.text: Allowlisted asset removal must be blocked during live auction for that asset.
properties.assertion: forall applyAssetParamsUpdates remove: auctionStart[asset]!=0 => revert LiveAuction

properties.text: performUpkeep endedAuctions must revert if asset has no active auction (auctionStart==0).
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep ended[j]: s_auctionStarts[asset]==0 => revert InvalidAuction

properties.text: Asset decimals in params must match actual ERC20 decimals to prevent price miscalculation.
properties.assertion: forall applyAssetParamsUpdates: params.decimals == IERC20Metadata(asset).decimals()

properties.text: getAssetOutAmount assetOutUsdPrice must be fetched with same validation mode as caller.
properties.assertion: getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, withValidation) called with caller's validation flag

properties.text: Bid on asset with decimals==0 (removed/unconfigured) must revert.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset): s_assetParams[asset].decimals==0 => revert (no valid auction)

properties.text: Division by assetOutUsdPrice in getAssetOutAmount must not divide by zero.
properties.assertion: getAssetOutAmount: assetOutUsdPrice > 0 (enforced by getAssetPrice withValidation=true)

properties.text: Precision loss in mulDivUp chain must not enable systematic value extraction across bids.
properties.assertion: sum(rounding_error per bid) << total_auction_value (bounded by 2 wei per bid)

properties.text: checkUpkeep with no valid prices returns upkeepNeeded=false, preventing stale auction starts.
properties.assertion: all prices invalid => eligibleAssets empty AND endedAuctions empty => upkeepNeeded=false

properties.text: Bid price calculation uses current asset price (not stale), fetched with validation=true.
properties.assertion: forall bid: assetPrice = getAssetPrice(asset, true) => reverts if stale/zero

properties.text: safeTransfer to bidder must use exact computed amount, not msg.value or other user input.
properties.assertion: forall bid: safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount) where amount == bid input parameter

properties.text: s_entered guard must be set to true before any external call in bid() flow.
properties.assertion: forall bid: s_entered=true precedes safeTransfer AND callback AND safeTransferFrom

properties.text: Auction must not accept bids after duration has elapsed (time-based expiry).
properties.assertion: forall bid: block.timestamp - auctionStart > auctionDuration => revert InvalidAuction

properties.text: performUpkeep must verify asset params exist (decimals!=0) before starting auction.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep start: assetParams.decimals==0 => revert AssetParamsNotSet

properties.text: performUpkeep eligible/ended arrays from stale checkUpkeep data must be re-validated.
properties.assertion: performUpkeep re-checks auctionStart, params, minSize for each eligible asset individually

properties.text: Bid assetOutAmount computation must use withValidation=true to reject zero/stale prices.
properties.assertion: _getAssetOutAmount called with withValidation=true during bid()

properties.text: Net token flow per bid: contract sends asset to bidder, receives assetOut from bidder.
properties.assertion: forall bid: delta(contract,asset)==-amount AND delta(contract,assetOut)==+assetOutAmount

properties.text: checkUpkeep must skip assets with decimals==0 (unconfigured/removed assets).
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep iter: assetParams.decimals==0 => continue (skip asset)

properties.text: Price query in bid() uses getAssetPrice(asset, true) not getAssetPrice(asset, false).
properties.assertion: bid() calls getAssetPrice with withValidation=true => stale/zero prices revert

properties.text: checkUpkeep getAssetPrice uses withValidation=false; invalid prices handled gracefully.
properties.assertion: checkUpkeep: getAssetPrice(asset, false) => no revert, returns isValid flag

properties.text: Concurrent bids on same auction must not cause balance underflow via race condition.
properties.assertion: forall concurrent bids: amount <= balanceOf(this) checked atomically per tx

properties.text: performUpkeep must call getAssetPrice(assetOut, true) validating assetOut price is fresh.
properties.assertion: performUpkeep: assetOutPrice = getAssetPrice(assetOut, true) => reverts if stale

properties.text: Only non-assetOut assets get new auctions; assetOut balance forwarded to receiver.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep: asset==s_assetOut => no auctionStart set, balance forwarded

properties.text: Bid assetOutAmount must never be zero for a valid bid (bidder always receives something).
properties.assertion: forall valid bid: _getAssetOutAmount > 0 when amount > 0 and prices > 0

properties.text: assetOutAmount must increase proportionally with bid amount (no overflow/truncation).
properties.assertion: forall bid: assetOutAmount(2*amt) >= 2*assetOutAmount(amt) - 2 (within rounding)

properties.text: Bid flow must emit AuctionBidSettled event with correct asset, amount, and assetOutAmount.
properties.assertion: forall bid: emit AuctionBidSettled(asset, amount, assetOutAmount) after transfers

properties.text: When auction ends via performUpkeep, remaining balance must return to feeAggregator.
properties.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd: ERC20(asset).transfer(feeAggregator, remaining) executed

properties.text: getAssetOutAmount with elapsed > duration must clamp elapsed to duration (no negative multiplier).
properties.assertion: elapsed = min(elapsed, duration) => (start-end)*elapsed/duration <= start-end

properties.text: Bid function must check auction liveness before any price computation or transfer.
properties.assertion: bid: auctionStart check precedes getAssetPrice and _getAssetOutAmount calls

properties.text: Dutch auction price must always be >= endingPrice for any elapsed time within duration.
properties.assertion: forall t in [0,duration]: priceMultiplier(t) >= endingPriceMultiplier

properties.text: s_entered flag must use exactly two states (false/true) with no intermediate values.
properties.assertion: s_entered ∈ {false, true} at all times; set to true at entry, false at exit

properties.text: Callback data passed to bidder contract must be exactly the data provided in bid() call.
properties.assertion: auctionCallback(msg.sender, assetOut, assetOutAmount, data) uses original calldata

properties.text: performUpkeep fund transfer (transferForSwap) only called when hasFeeAggregator is true.
properties.assertion: hasFeeAggregator ? feeAggregator.transferForSwap : no external call for funding

properties.text: safeTransferFrom in bid must pull exact assetOutAmount from bidder (not more, not less).
properties.assertion: safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), assetOutAmount) == computed assetOutAmount

properties.text: Bid value check uses bidUsdValue = amount * assetPrice / 10^decimals consistently.
properties.assertion: bidUsdValue computed as amount * assetPrice / 10^assetDecimals (same decimals as params)

properties.text: Auction started with zero balance (race between checkUpkeep and performUpkeep) must revert.
properties.assertion: performUpkeep: availableUsdValue < minAuctionSizeUsd => revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize

properties.text: s_allowlistedAssets.values() iteration in checkUpkeep must handle empty set gracefully.
properties.assertion: s_allowlistedAssets.length==0 => checkUpkeep returns upkeepNeeded=false

properties.text: Price multiplier intermediate computation must not overflow uint256.
properties.assertion: (startMult-endMult)*elapsed does not overflow uint256 for valid param ranges

properties.text: amountIn * assetInPrice intermediate in getAssetOutAmount must not overflow.
properties.assertion: mulDivUp(amountIn, assetInPrice, 10^decimals) does not overflow for valid inputs

properties.text: Bid for assetOut token itself must be impossible (assetOut is payment, not auctioned).
properties.assertion: bid(s_assetOut, amount, data) cannot succeed (no auction for assetOut)

properties.text: performUpkeep must not start auctions for more assets than were in checkUpkeep eligible list.
properties.assertion: performUpkeep processes only decoded eligible/ended arrays, no extra assets

properties.text: Reentrancy via safeTransfer return value manipulation must not bypass s_entered guard.
properties.assertion: safeTransfer uses OpenZeppelin SafeERC20 which handles non-standard return values

properties.text: ERC20 approval from bidder to auction contract must cover assetOutAmount before bid.
properties.assertion: ERC20(assetOut).allowance(msg.sender, this) >= assetOutAmount at safeTransferFrom time

properties.text: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed price in getAssetPrice.
properties.assertion: getAssetPrice: if streamsPrice.timestamp >= minTimestamp then use streamsPrice, skip dataFeed

properties.text: Stale Data Streams price must fall back to Data Feed only when dataFeed is configured.
properties.assertion: streamsStale AND usdDataFeed!=address(0) => use dataFeed; usdDataFeed==0 => keep stale streams

properties.text: When both price sources are stale, the most recent timestamp wins in getAssetPrice.
properties.assertion: if both stale: updatedAt(streams) >= updatedAt(dataFeed) => use streams, else use dataFeed

properties.text: All prices returned by getAssetPrice must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals.
properties.assertion: forall getAssetPrice: returned price normalized to 18 decimals regardless of source

properties.text: getAssetPrice with withValidation=true must revert on zero price.
properties.assertion: withValidation==true AND price==0 => revert ZeroFeedData()

properties.text: getAssetPrice with withValidation=true must revert on stale timestamp.
properties.assertion: withValidation==true AND updatedAt < block.timestamp-staleness => revert StaleFeedData()

properties.text: Data Feed answer cast via SafeCast must revert on negative price values.
properties.assertion: int256(answer).toUint256() reverts if answer < 0

properties.text: isValid flag must be false when price is zero OR timestamp is stale.
properties.assertion: isValid = (price != 0) AND (updatedAt >= block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold)

properties.text: transmit must validate all feed IDs as allowlisted BEFORE calling verifyBulk.
properties.assertion: forall transmit: pre-validation loop checks s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId]!=0 before verify

properties.text: transmit report.price cast from int192 to uint256 must revert on negative values.
properties.assertion: int256(report.price).toUint256() reverts if report.price < 0 (SafeCast)

properties.text: transmit must reject stale report data (observationsTimestamp vs staleness threshold).
properties.assertion: observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold => revert StaleFeedData()

properties.text: transmit must reject zero price after scaling (prevents storing invalid price data).
properties.assertion: usdPrice==0 after decimal scaling => revert ZeroFeedData()

properties.text: transmit price scaling must normalize all prices to exactly 18 decimals before storage.
properties.assertion: feedDecimals<18 => price*10^(18-dec); feedDecimals>18 => price/10^(dec-18); ==18 => noop

properties.text: Only PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE can call transmit (access control on price submission).
properties.assertion: forall transmit: onlyRole(PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE) modifier enforced

properties.text: Feed ID rotation must preserve fallback price source for previous asset.
properties.assertion: feedId rotation: previousAsset must have usdDataFeed fallback or revert InvalidZeroValue

properties.text: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset must map each feedId to exactly one asset (no collision).
properties.assertion: forall feedId: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] maps to at most one asset address

properties.text: At least one price source required per asset (dataStreamsFeedId OR usdDataFeed).
properties.assertion: forall applyFeedInfoUpdates add: feedId==0 AND dataFeed==0 => revert InvalidZeroValue

properties.text: stalenessThreshold must be non-zero for every feed configuration.
properties.assertion: forall applyFeedInfoUpdates add: stalenessThreshold==0 => revert InvalidZeroValue

properties.text: Data Streams feed version must be exactly 3 (protocol requirement).
properties.assertion: forall applyFeedInfoUpdates add: dataStreamsFeedId!=0 => version must be 3

properties.text: When feedId changes for existing asset, old feedIdToAsset and streamsPrice must be cleaned.
properties.assertion: existingFeedId != newFeedId => delete s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[old] and s_dataStreamsPrice[old]

properties.text: s_allowlistedAssets and s_feedInfo must remain in sync after add/remove operations.
properties.assertion: forall asset: asset in s_allowlistedAssets <=> s_feedInfo[asset] is set

properties.text: Data streams feed decimals must be non-zero when data streams feed is configured.
properties.assertion: dataStreamsFeedId!=0 => dataStreamsFeedDecimals > 0, else revert InvalidFeedDecimals

properties.text: verifierProxy is immutable after construction (cannot be changed post-deploy).
properties.assertion: i_streamsVerifierProxy set in constructor, no setter function exists

properties.text: transmit pre-validation decodes feedId from UNVERIFIED data — must not trust content beyond feedId.
properties.assertion: pre-validation only reads bytes32(reportData) for feedId check, no other fields trusted

properties.text: Stored DataStreamsPriceInfo timestamp must equal report observationsTimestamp, not block.timestamp.
properties.assertion: s_dataStreamsPrice[asset] = DataStreamsPriceInfo(usdPrice, report.observationsTimestamp)

properties.text: Price scaling in getAssetPrice must match scaling direction used in transmit.
properties.assertion: getAssetPrice dataFeed scaling uses same formula as transmit: dec<18 => multiply, >18 => divide

properties.text: transmit with empty unverifiedReports array must revert.
properties.assertion: unverifiedReports.length==0 => revert EmptyList()

properties.text: Price scaling precision loss in division (feedDecimals>18) must not produce zero for valid prices.
properties.assertion: price / 10^(feedDecimals-18) > 0 when original price > 10^(feedDecimals-18)

properties.text: Cryptographic verification of Data Streams reports delegated to verifierProxy (trusted).
properties.assertion: verifierProxy.verifyBulk returns only authentic verified reports

properties.text: Feed removal must clean all associated state: feedIdToAsset, feedInfo, and dataStreamsPrice.
properties.assertion: forall remove: delete s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset AND s_feedInfo AND s_dataStreamsPrice for asset
